notes: WIN-FND-005. Source-only ledger proving the row's 'compact/comfortable metrics compiled; density selection is STORED-value-only, metric plumbing still target-only' claim is internally consistent and not silently regressing. Stage 1 of the Material rewrite adds a selectable MaterialDensity (Appearance group, default 0 = Comfortable) and the density radios in cui/uiconfig/ui/appearance.ui, but the value is honest-inert: no compact/comfortable metric mapping consumes it yet (that is Stage 3, WIN-FND-005's build gate). This ledger pins the 15 single-profile native metric roles (re-parsed independently of check-material-theme.py), the target compact/comfortable table (docs/design/01-foundations.md section 6), MATERIAL_DESIGN.md's density honesty language, the calc-chrome.json per-surface density carve-out consistency, and a Git-tracked selector-PRESENCE guard (migrated from the earlier absence guard: the selector must now exist, and vanishing would mean the stored selection regressed). It implements no metric selector and advances none of the row's build/pixel/matrix/perf/compat gates: wiring the metric schema to comfortable/compact, and rendered evidence, are the separate build gates. Source evidence only: runtime_verified is false.

design_honesty.note: MATERIAL_DESIGN.md's Desktop density section must keep both named profiles and its 'implemented and verified separately' honesty language.
markers: must be implemented and verified separately

carveout.note: calc-chrome.json's density carve-out (--tb, --menu) must stay byte-consistent with the section-6 master table (px stripped) and keep status 'specified', so a per-surface value cannot silently diverge from the foundation.

selector_presence.note: Stage 1 makes density selectable but stored-value-only (honest-inert; the compact/comfortable metric plumbing is Stage 3). The selector now surfaces as the MaterialDensity officecfg property and the density radio widgets in cui/uiconfig/ui/appearance.ui. This guard was MIGRATED from the earlier absence guard per the migrate-never-freeze-stock rule: a Git-tracked walk over *.ui and *.xcs/*.xcu must now FIND both selectors; their disappearance means the stored selection regressed and this ledger must be revisited.
